name: Project Butler
description_en: A project-memory system for AI coding assistants that preserves context across sessions.
description_zh: 面向 AI 编码助手的项目记忆系统,在多次会话间保留上下文。
long_en: A skill that maintains durable project context (decisions, structure, notes) so assistants like Claude Code or Cursor resume with continuity.
long_zh: 维护持久项目上下文(决策、结构、笔记)的技能,让 Claude Code、Cursor 等助手能延续上下文继续工作。
sec_note_en: Stores project notes locally; review what it persists.
sec_note_zh: 在本地存储项目笔记;请审阅其持久化的内容。
